ddls:
CREATE TABLE "firearms" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm */,
  "weapon_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm type */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the firearm */,
  "fire_rate" REAL /* Fire rate of the firearm */,
  "wall_penetration" TEXT /* Wall penetration level of the firearm (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "magazine_capacity" INTEGER /* Magazine capacity of the firearm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the firearm */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the firearm */,
  "muzzle_velocity" REAL /* Muzzle velocity of the firearm */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the firearm */,
  "stability" REAL /* Stability of the firearm */,
  "reload_time" REAL /* Reload time of the firearm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp for the firearm */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the firearm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_firearms_weapon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_type_id") REFERENCES weapon_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firearm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the firearm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the firearm type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL for the firearm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage profile */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm the profile belongs to */,
  "hdmg_0" INTEGER /* Head damage at range 0 */,
  "bdmg_0" INTEGER /* Body damage at range 0 */,
  "ldmg_0" INTEGER /* Leg damage at range 0 */,
  "hdmg_1" INTEGER /* Head damage at range 1 */,
  "bdmg_1" INTEGER /* Body damage at range 1 */,
  "ldmg_1" INTEGER /* Leg damage at range 1 */,
  "hdmg_2" INTEGER /* Head damage at range 2 */,
  "bdmg_2" INTEGER /* Body damage at range 2 */,
  "ldmg_2" INTEGER /* Leg damage at range 2 */,
  "armour_penetration" TEXT /* Armour penetration level of the firearm (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_profiles_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "firearm_game" (
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firearm_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., gamer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt for the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp for the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the firearm data */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the firearm data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text describing the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., balance change, new feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user marking the firearm as favorite */,
  "firearm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the firearm being marked as favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the firearm was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_firearm_id FOREIGN KEY ("firearm_id") REFERENCES firearms ("firearm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
